identity_baseline: Green Martian (Thark) chieftain and high-ranking leader.
stable_visual_summary: An enormous green Martian of the Thark race, Lorquas Ptomel carries the imposing presence of a high-ranking chieftain and warrior leader. He possesses a stern demeanor and an authoritative silhouette, typically clad in Thark warrior attire.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain green skin pigmentation consistent with the Thark race.
Must maintain an enormous physical scale relative to other characters.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific facial features or scars are not detailed.
Exact age/stage of life is unstated.
